recent_form_summary: Inconsistent recently: lost to Paul at the French Open, won a 5-set R1 there, entered Halle as a lucky loser, won an entry-round match (9 aces) before losing R1 to Shelton.
stat_trend_summary: Confirmed 9 aces in his Halle win over Basilashvili; 2026 season average is 4.5 aces/match (down from 5.8 career), and his grass-specific rate is historically just 0.46 aces/game.
opponent_factor_summary: Navone is a clay-oriented player with a modest return game (~44.9% return points won) and this is his first grass match of the season -- no grass-specific return data exists for him.
injury_news: None found; benefited from Kyrgios's withdrawal to gain Halle entry.
notes: Leads the H2H 2-0 (1-0 on grass) but poor recent grass-season serving stats (4.5/match in 2026, down from 5.8 career) and mixed recent results land this near a coin-flip on the 3.5 line.
